list.title: Access Lists (IP Allow/Deny)
list.name: Name
list.empty: No access lists configured. Create one to manage IP-based access control.

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this access list?

help.name: Enter a name for this access list.
help.description: Enter a description for this access list.
help.satisfyAny: If enabled, access is satisfied if ANY rule matches (OR logic). If disabled, standard rule processing applies.
help.passAuth: Pass the Basic Authorization header to the upstream server.
help.accessRules: Define IP ranges and rules to allow or deny.
